items.summary: Center the three styled brand name elements ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') displayed in the hero section (the h1 elements at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/h1[1], h1[2], and h1[3]) so they are horizontally centered on the page instead of left-aligned.

In the left side top area of the hero section, remove the duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text labels (the second occurrence of the brand name) and replace them with the original logo image asset (the same logo used in the Navbar).
